name: Single filer - High income
description: High earner at €250,000 in Saxony, capped social security contributions, with solidarity surcharge

sources.description: Income tax (€86,546) computed via §32a EStG 2025 Zone 4 formula: floor(0.42 * 232043 - 10911.92). Soli = 86546 × 5.5% = 4760.03. Social security at caps. Verified using bmf-steuerrechner.de.
sources.notes: §32a EStG 2025: https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/estg/__32a.html. Saxony (SN) care rate 2.9% childless. Pension cap €96,600, health/care cap €66,150. zvE = 250,000 - 17,956.28 = 232,043. Soli applies: 86,546 > 19,950 threshold.
